name: web-ai-showcase model-download route inventory
description: Every built demo route classified by download runtime/loader family, byte-transfer control, and honest resume capability. Foundation for the site-wide <model-download-status> component + its fail-closed adoption gate (Task 2b).

legend.family: which runtime/loader transfers the model assets
legend.byteControl: site-controlled (the page fetches bytes) | runtime-owned (a library fetches) | browser-owned | none
legend.resume: resumable (Range/206) | restart-only | runtime-owned | cached-only (whole-file cache) | non-applicable | unknown
legend.status: pending-adoption | adopted | honestly-limited | non-applicable | blocked | unknown (unknown FAILS the gate)

routes.note: MediaPipe Tasks fetches the .task/.tflite bundle; download managed inside the WASM runtime
Transformers.js pipeline() fetches each file (no Range); whole-file cache resume only
Transformers.js fetches each file (no Range); re-running resumes at whole-file granularity from Cache Storage
page fetches the .onnx bytes itself and hands them to ORT; restartable unless routed via model-download.js
